things.name: Ganvie Lake Village
things.description: Africa's largest lake village - 30,000 people living in stilt houses on Lake Nokoue

things.name: Ouidah Slave Route & Door of No Return
things.description: Slave trade memorial trail ending at the Atlantic beach - the most important in West Africa

things.name: Dantokpa Market
things.description: West Africa's largest market sprawling across the Cotonou waterfront

things.name: Royal Palaces of Abomey
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage capital of the Dahomey kingdom with warrior bas-reliefs

things.name: Python Temple (Ouidah)
things.description: Temple in Ouidah where 50 royal pythons are kept - one will be placed around your neck

things.name: Porto-Novo Royal Palace
things.description: Former king's palace of the neighbouring capital with ethnographic museum

things.name: Zomachi Voodoo Ceremony
things.description: Annual National Voodoo Day on January 10 celebrated across Ouidah

things.name: Musee d'Histoire de Ouidah
things.description: Former Portuguese slave fort turned into a museum of the Dahomey slave trade

things.name: Cotonou Marina Market
things.description: Market built over the lagoon with crafts, hammocks and fresh produce

things.name: Atassi (Haricot Bean Stew)
things.description: Benin's popular street dish - black-eyed bean stew with palm oil and spices
